name: slide-ask-ai-extension
description: A Chrome extension that lets you select text on a page and ask AI.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/build-markdown-runtime.mjs && node --check src/content/markdown-runtime-entry.mjs && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/background/shared.js && node --check src/background/prompt.js && node --check src/background/debug.js && node --check src/background/api.js && node --check src/background/main.js && node --check src/content/shared.js && node --check src/content/markdown.js && node --check src/content/selection.js && node --check src/content/ui.js && node --check src/content/main.js && node --check popup/popup.js
